Response: Based on our support documentation, here's what we found:  **Solution 1: Claude API - Getting Started** To use the Claude API: 1) Create a Claude account at claude.com, 2) Generate an API key from your account settings, 3) Install the Claude SDK for your programming language, 4) Authenticate using your API key, 5) Make API calls to interact with Claude. Your API key should be kept secret and never shared publicly. Store it as an environment variable or in a secure configuration file. The API supports various models with different capabilities and pricing.  **Solution 2: Claude Chat - Pricing and Billing** Claude offers flexible pricing options. For API users: pay-as-you-go pricing based on tokens consumed. For Claude Plus subscribers: $20/month for unlimited chat access. For enterprise: contact sales for custom pricing. Your billing is tracked per month and invoiced at the end of the billing cycle. Payment methods accepted include credit cards and ACH transfers. To avoid unexpected charges, set spending limits in your account settings.   _Confidence Level: 55%_  ⚠️ Note: Our confidence in this answer is moderate. Based on our support documentation, here's what we found:  **Solution 1: Getting Started with HackerRank Contests** HackerRank contests are competitive programming challenges where you can test your skills against other programmers worldwide. To get started: 1) Create a HackerRank account, 2) Browse available contests, 3) Register for a contest, 4) Solve the problems within the time limit, 5) Submit your solutions. Contests are categorized by difficulty and language support. You can participate in real-time contests or practice with past contests. Prizes and leaderboard rankings are awarded based on performance.  **Solution 2: Account Registration and Login Issues** If you're having trouble logging into your HackerRank account: 1) Make sure you're using the correct email address, 2) Check that caps lock is off, 3) Try the 'Forgot Password' link to reset your password. To create a new account: 1) Go to the signup page, 2) Enter your email and create a strong password, 3) Verify your email address. If you still cannot access your account, ensure you're using a supported browser and try clearing your cache and cookies.   _Confidence Level: 61%_  ⚠️ Note: Our confidence in this answer is moderate.
